items.title: Types & Interfaces
items.description: Bundlers/compilers are what type-check (tsc) and strip TypeScript types to produce runnable JavaScript.

items.title: Node.js Basics
items.description: Bundlers and runners (Vite, tsx) run on Node and are configured via package.json scripts.

items.title: Lockfiles & Reproducibility
items.description: Tooling versions and dependencies are pinned in lockfiles so builds are reproducible.
